case_title: MELANIE JONES VS. HSIANG WEN HUANG

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JONES, MELANIE AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, HSIANG WEN

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-30-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, HSIANG WEN
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-21-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-01-2010 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-21-2010 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-21-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-21-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JONES, MELANIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HUANG, HSIANG WEN THE EVIDENCE WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH THAT PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES WERE CAUSED BY AN ACT OR OMISSION OF DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT HUANG, HSIANG WEN RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT JONES, MELANIE $3,350.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,410.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
